name: compound-engineering
description: 用于 code review、research、design 和 workflow automation 的 AI-powered development tools。

interface.shortDescription: 用于 code review、research、design 和 workflow automation 的 AI-powered development tools。
interface.longDescription: Compound Engineering 是一套 skills 和 agents，让每个 engineering work unit 都比上一个更容易完成。你可以 brainstorm requirements、plan implementations、用 specialized reviewers 做 code review、research institutional learnings，并 capture solved problems，让 future work 受益。Skills 会通过 Codex native install；如果需要 specialized review 和 research agents 的完整体验，请在安装后运行配套 Bun converter（见 README）。
